exercises.title: SIKE Size Calculator
exercises.description: Calculate SIKE key and ciphertext sizes.
exercises.task: Compute sizes for different SIKE parameter sets.

exercises.title: Protocol Simulator
exercises.task: Implement the protocol flow without real crypto.
hints: Both parties should derive same shared secret

exercises.title: Speed Comparison
exercises.description: Compare SIKE speed to other schemes.

exercises.title: Auxiliary Point Analysis
exercises.task: Analyze information content of auxiliary data.
hints: Each point has 4 field elements (x, y over F_q²)
